rentalCars.pickup: LAX (5251 W 98th St, Los Angeles, CA 90045)
rentalCars.covers: LA, Ridgecrest, Death Valley, Vegas arrival
Grand Canyon, Page, Antelope Canyon, Bryce, Zion, return to Vegas

days.title: Arrive Los Angeles
days.subtitle: Newark → LAX → Motel 6

weather.tips: Pleasant LA evening, light jacket for outdoor wait at LAX

dailyTips: Body clock will be 3 hours ahead (EST) — everyone will be tired
Let toddler sleep in car on way to hotel
Don't forget to install car seat at Hertz!
Fill water bottles before leaving airport

activities.title: Depart Newark (Spirit NK 1670)
activities.notes: Spirit Terminal A. Board bags online to save $. Toddler ear pressure: sippy cup during takeoff/landing.
tips: Pre-board with toddler (ask gate agent)
Downloaded shows on tablet — no free entertainment on Spirit
Snacks from home — Spirit charges for everything

activities.title: Land at LAX
activities.notes: Collect baggage at carousel. Follow signs to Baggage Claim (lower level).

activities.title: Baggage Claim + Hertz Shuttle
activities.notes: Grab bags, exit to LAX-it shuttle area, find Hertz blue shuttle (every 5-10 min).

activities.title: Pick Up Hertz Rental Car
activities.notes: Install car seat FIRST! Check car condition, note any damage. Unlimited mileage confirmed.
tips: Install car seat before loading bags
Take photos of any existing car damage
Check tire pressure and gas level

activities.title: Drive to Motel 6
activities.notes: Very short drive! Motel 6 is right near LAX.

activities.title: Check into Motel 6
activities.notes: Late night check-in. Get room, unload essentials only, everyone to bed ASAP.
tips: Just bring essentials — unpack rest tomorrow
Toddler may be cranky — get them to bed fast

days.title: LA Sightseeing → Ridgecrest
days.subtitle: Beverly Hills, Hollywood, Griffith Observatory → Desert Drive

weather.tips: Perfect spring weather. Layers recommended — starts cool, warms up.

hotel.name: Clarion Pointe Ridgecrest
hotel.address: 535 S China Lake Blvd, Ridgecrest, CA 93555

dailyTips: Comfortable walking shoes — you'll walk 2-3 miles today
LA sun is strong — reapply sunscreen
Save tablet for the long afternoon drive to Ridgecrest
Gas up before leaving LA area

activities.title: Wake Up + Breakfast
activities.notes: McDonald's next door if no hotel breakfast. Grab extras for car snacks.
tips: Quick breakfast — big day ahead!
Pack up room completely, DON'T FORGET CHARGERS

activities.title: Checkout Motel 6 + Drive to Beverly Hills

distance.route: I-405 N → I-10 W → Beverly Hills

activities.notes: Return key cards. Mid-morning traffic should be moderate (sweet spot between rush hours).

activities.title: Rodeo Drive Exploration
activities.notes: 100% FREE to walk and window shop! Only 3 blocks long.
whatToDo: Beverly Wilshire Hotel — 'Pretty Woman' hotel, walk into lobby for photos
Tiffany & Co, Gucci, Prada — window shopping
Via Rodeo — cobblestone European-style street, best photo spot
2 Rodeo Drive — spiral staircase, fountains
People watching — spot luxury cars!
tips: Free parking on Dayton Way (1 block east)
Take family photo at Beverly Wilshire entrance
2-hour parking limit on most streets

activities.title: Lunch in West Hollywood
activities.notes: Multiple restaurant options. Budget ~$30-40 for family.

activities.title: Hollywood Sign Photos

distance.route: Drive from lunch to Lake Hollywood Park

activities.notes: Best close-up view of Hollywood Sign without hiking. Flat, stroller-friendly path.
whatToDo: Walk to viewpoint — 5 minute flat walk from parking
Family photos with Hollywood Sign behind you
See Lake Hollywood reservoir
tips: Park on Canyon Lake Dr (free street parking)
Don't try to hike to the actual sign — too far with toddler

activities.title: Griffith Observatory + LA Sunset

location.name: Griffith Observatory
location.address: 2800 E Observatory Rd, Los Angeles, CA 90027

activities.notes: FREE admission! One of LA's best attractions. Amazing city views + Hollywood Sign visible.
whatToDo: Observation decks — 360° views of LA, Hollywood Sign, ocean on clear day
Tesla Coil show (free, inside, ~5 min) — toddler will love sparks!
Planet exhibits (free) — touch meteorites, see moon/planet displays
Zeiss telescope (free at night) — if staying past dark
Sunset viewing from front lawn — spectacular!
tips: Parking is $10/hour (limited!) — arrive by 3:15 PM
Sunset ~6:30-7:00 PM in late March
Bring jacket for evening — gets breezy up on the hill

activities.title: Drive Toward Desert (Start)
activities.notes: Head north/east out of LA. Traffic should be manageable by 6 PM going outbound.

activities.title: Dinner Stop — Palmdale
activities.notes: Last major food stop before Ridgecrest. Multiple fast food and restaurant options.
tips: Fill gas tank here — cheaper than Ridgecrest

activities.title: Drive to Ridgecrest
activities.notes: Dark desert drive. Good road but no services. Downloaded music/podcasts recommended.
tips: Watch for wildlife on desert roads at night
Keep headlights on high when no oncoming traffic

activities.title: Check into Clarion Pointe Ridgecrest

location.name: Clarion Pointe Ridgecrest
location.address: 535 S China Lake Blvd, Ridgecrest, CA 93555

activities.notes: Quick check-in, unpack, everyone to bed. Breakfast included tomorrow!
tips: Ask about breakfast hours (usually 6:30-9:30 AM)

days.title: Death Valley → Vegas + Car Swap
days.subtitle: Death Valley National Park → Henderson → Midnight Car Swap

weather.tips: Death Valley is HOT even in March. Light clothes, sun protection, LOTS of water!

hotel.name: Best Western Plus Las Vegas South Henderson

dailyTips: ⚠️ BUY 6 GALLONS WATER before entering Death Valley!
⚠️ FILL GAS in Ridgecrest — NO gas in Death Valley!
Long day — ends at 12:45 AM with car swap
NAP at hotel 7:30-11 PM before car swap
DON'T FORGET CAR SEAT when switching cars!

activities.title: Wake Up + Breakfast (Hotel Included)
activities.notes: Breakfast included! Eat hearty — Death Valley has NO food. Grab extras if allowed.
tips: This serves as breakfast AND lunch
Load up on protein + carbs + fruit

activities.title: ⚠️ BUY WATER + Fill Gas
activities.notes: ⚠️ NOT OPTIONAL! Buy 6 gallons water ($6 at Walmart). Fill gas to 100%. Last bathroom before Death Valley!
tips: One parent runs into Walmart, other stays with toddler
Get extra snacks, crackers, trail mix
Check tire pressure while pumping gas

activities.title: Drive to Death Valley
activities.notes: Desert drive, almost no traffic. Cell service spotty to none — use offline maps! Look for Joshua trees and wild burros.
tips: Watch speed — easy to go fast on empty roads
America the Beautiful pass saves money ($30 entry)

activities.title: Artist's Palette Scenic Drive
activities.notes: 9-mile one-way scenic loop drive through colorful rock formations. Stay in car with AC — it's hot!
whatToDo: Drive the one-way loop (9 miles, ~30 min)
Stop at viewpoints for photos
See the rainbow-colored hillsides (iron, mica, manganese deposits)
Short walks to rock formations (stay on trail)
tips: Keep AC running
Quick stops only — it's 85°F outside
Beautiful photo opportunity

activities.title: Badwater Basin — Lowest Point in N. America!
activities.notes: -282 feet below sea level! Walk out on the salt flats. Look for the 'sea level' sign on cliff above.
whatToDo: Walk onto salt flats (boardwalk then open flats)
Look UP at cliff — see 'SEA LEVEL' sign 282 ft above you
Feel the salt crystals under your feet
Take family photo at the Badwater Basin sign
tips: Don't walk too far out — it's HOT
10-15 minutes on flats is enough
Bring water to drink while walking
Toddler in stroller or carrier

activities.title: Zabriskie Point
activities.notes: Stunning golden badlands viewpoint. Short walk from parking lot.
whatToDo: Walk to main viewpoint (2 min from parking)
Panoramic photos of golden/yellow badlands
See Manly Beacon (pointed peak)
Look across entire Death Valley
tips: Short easy walk
Bring sun hat — no shade
Amazing photos in afternoon light

activities.title: Drive to Pahrump (Exit Death Valley)
activities.notes: Leaving Death Valley into Nevada. Landscape transitions from desert valley to sagebrush.

activities.title: Early Dinner — Pahrump, NV
activities.notes: Quick stop for food. First real town since Ridgecrest. Multiple fast food options.

activities.title: Check into Best Western Henderson
activities.notes: Check in, unpack, settle toddler. Breakfast included tomorrow!
tips: SET ALARM for 11 PM (car swap!)
Everyone should nap 7:30-11 PM

activities.title: ⚠️ REST / NAP Before Car Swap
activities.notes: ⚠️ CRITICAL: Sleep now! Car swap is at 11:30 PM. Set multiple alarms for 11 PM.

activities.title: ⚠️ MIDNIGHT CAR SWAP (Hertz → Avis)
activities.notes: ⚠️ DON'T FORGET: Move CAR SEAT from Hertz to Avis! Return Hertz, pick up Avis, drive back to hotel.
tips: Car seat transfer is #1 priority
Check new Avis car condition
Keep all Hertz receipts
15 min drive each way from hotel

days.title: Hoover Dam → Grand Canyon Sunset
days.subtitle: Henderson → Hoover Dam → Kingman → Valle → Grand Canyon

weather.summary: Henderson 72°F | Hoover Dam 75°F | Grand Canyon 55°F→45°F at sunset
weather.tips: Grand Canyon is COLD at sunset! 7,000 ft elevation. BRING WARM JACKETS for evening!

dailyTips: Grand Canyon entry: $35 OR America the Beautiful pass
Sunset ~7:00-7:15 PM — plan arrival by 5 PM!
Temperature drops 10-15°F at sunset — warm clothes essential!
Pack warm jackets accessible in car (NOT trunk!)

activities.title: Wake Up + Breakfast (Hotel Included)
activities.notes: Breakfast included. Eat well — lunch not until 1 PM.

activities.title: Checkout + Depart for Hoover Dam
activities.notes: Quick checkout. Have warm jackets accessible for Grand Canyon this evening!

activities.title: Drive to Hoover Dam
activities.notes: Lake Mead visible on approach. Security checkpoint at dam — all vehicles screened.
tips: There IS a security checkpoint — don't be surprised

activities.title: Hoover Dam Visit
activities.notes: Engineering marvel! Free to walk across the dam. Visitor center is optional ($10/person).
whatToDo: Walk across the dam (free!) — see both NV and AZ sides
Look down 726 feet to Colorado River below
See the Mike O'Callaghan–Pat Tillman Memorial Bridge
Photo ops with Art Deco angel statues
Visitor Center (optional, $10/adult, $8/child)
tips: Free to walk and photograph
Stroller works fine on walkway
No large bags allowed (security)
Two time zones on the dam — NV and AZ!

activities.title: Lunch in Kingman, AZ
activities.notes: Multiple restaurant options. Historic Route 66 town! Budget ~$30-40.

activities.title: Drive to Valle (Grand Canyon Inn)
activities.notes: Longest drive segment today. Landscape changes from desert to pine forests as you gain elevation.

activities.title: Check into Grand Canyon Inn
activities.notes: Quick check-in. Change into warm layers! Grand Canyon will be COLD.
tips: PUT ON WARM JACKETS NOW
Temperature at canyon: 55°F dropping to 45°F

activities.title: Drive to Grand Canyon South Rim
activities.notes: Show America the Beautiful pass at entrance. Get free park map!

activities.title: ⭐ GRAND CANYON SUNSET Experience
activities.notes: TRIP HIGHLIGHT! Sunset ~7:00-7:15 PM. Arrive early for best viewing spots.
whatToDo: Mather Point — first and most iconic viewpoint
Rim Trail walk (paved, stroller-friendly) toward Yavapai Point
Yavapai Geology Museum — free, great exhibits
Watch sunset colors transform the canyon walls
Golden hour photography — the canyon glows orange/red/purple
tips: Sunset ~7:00-7:15 PM late March
Arrive by 5:15 PM to explore before sunset
COLD at sunset — wear warm jackets!
Stay behind railings — serious drop-offs
Toddler must be supervised at ALL times near edge

activities.title: Dinner at/near Hotel
activities.notes: Limited options in Valle. Hotel may have restaurant or snack bar. Bring backup snacks.

days.title: ⚠️ CRITICAL: Antelope Canyon Day
days.subtitle: Quick Grand Canyon Morning → Antelope Canyon Tour → Horseshoe Bend

weather.tips: Grand Canyon morning is COLD (48°F). Page afternoon is warm (75°F). Layers!

hotel.name: Super 8 by Wyndham Page
hotel.address: 649 S Lake Powell Blvd, Page, AZ 86040

dailyTips: ⚠️ 6:45 AM WAKE-UP — earliest of trip! SET 3+ ALARMS!
⚠️ MUST leave Grand Canyon by 9:00 AM SHARP!
⚠️ Arrive Dixie's office by 11:30 AM (45 min early — MANDATORY)
Pack EVERYTHING the night before — no time in morning
REST period 2-3:30 PM after tour is essential

activities.title: ⚠️ EARLY Wake Up + Grab-and-Go Breakfast
activities.notes: ⚠️ DO NOT HIT SNOOZE! Grab breakfast items packed last night. Eat in car. NO SHOWERS — no time!
tips: Clothes should be laid out from last night
Toddler will be cranky — power through!
Just grab toddler + final items and GO

activities.title: Pack Car + Checkout
activities.notes: Should be mostly packed from last night. Quick room sweep, return keys, GO.

activities.title: Drive to Grand Canyon (Quick Morning Visit)
Quick Grand Canyon Morning Visit
activities.notes: Quick visit — morning light on the canyon is beautiful! Different vibe than sunset.
whatToDo: Mather Point in morning light — stunning different perspective
Quick Rim Trail walk if time
Gift shop for souvenirs (opens ~8 AM)
tips: ⚠️ MUST LEAVE BY 9:00 AM — non-negotiable!
Set phone alarm for 8:50 AM as warning

activities.title: ⚠️ Drive Grand Canyon → Page (CRITICAL TIMING)
activities.notes: ⚠️ ZERO room for error! 2.5-hour drive. Optional quick stop at Cameron Trading Post (10:15 AM, 15 min max).
tips: Cameron Trading Post at 10:15 AM — bathroom + quick look only
Don't linger — tour is non-refundable!

activities.title: ⭐ ANTELOPE CANYON TOUR (Dixie's Lower)

location.name: Dixie's Lower Antelope Canyon Tours
location.address: 48 S Lake Powell Blvd, Page, AZ 86040

activities.notes: ⭐ TRIP HIGHLIGHT! Must arrive by 11:30 AM (45 min before 12:15 PM tour). ~1 hour tour + transport.
whatToDo: Check in at Dixie's office by 11:30 AM
Board shuttle to canyon entrance
Walk through slot canyon — narrow, winding, light beams!
Photos of light beams (best 11 AM-1 PM)
Follow guide's instructions at all times
tips: Light jackets — 60°F inside canyon
Camera/phone for photos
Follow guide exactly
Toddler must walk (no strollers in canyon)
Bring water

activities.title: Drive to Hotel + Check In

location.name: Super 8 Page
location.address: 649 S Lake Powell Blvd, Page, AZ 86040

activities.notes: Quick check-in. Everyone needs rest after the early morning!

activities.title: ⚠️ CRITICAL REST PERIOD
activities.notes: ⚠️ ESSENTIAL! Everyone nap/rest. You've been up since 6:45 AM. Toddler needs this. Adults need this.

activities.title: ⭐ Horseshoe Bend
activities.notes: Iconic Colorado River horseshoe-shaped meander. 1.5-mile round trip walk from parking.
whatToDo: Walk trail from parking lot (0.75 miles, ~15 min)
Arrive at cliff edge — jaw-dropping 1,000 ft drop
Photos of the horseshoe bend
Late afternoon light is beautiful
tips: $10 parking fee
Carry toddler OR use carrier near edge
⚠️ NO RAILING at the edge — hold toddler tightly!
Bring water for the walk
Stroller works on most of trail

activities.title: Dinner in Page
activities.notes: Multiple restaurant options on Lake Powell Blvd. Budget ~$40-50.

activities.title: Back to Hotel + Relax + PACK FOR TOMORROW
activities.notes: Relax, pack for tomorrow (Bryce Canyon — need WARM clothes accessible!). Early-ish bedtime.

days.timezoneNote: Crosses AZ(MST/UTC-7) → UT(MDT/UTC-6). Phone clock jumps FORWARD 1hr at border. All times listed in MDT.
days.title: Page → Bryce Canyon
days.subtitle: Drive to Bryce Canyon National Park — Hoodoos & Rim Trail

weather.tips: Bryce is 8,000 ft elevation — 20-30°F colder than Page! Pack WARM jackets, long pants, maybe gloves!

hotel.name: Best Western Plus Ruby's Inn
hotel.address: 26 S Main St, Bryce Canyon City, UT 84764

dailyTips: SLEEP IN today! 8:30 AM wake-up (you earned it!)
Bryce = 8,000 ft = COLD! 40-55°F
Have warm jackets accessible in car, NOT trunk
Entry fee: $35 OR America the Beautiful pass

activities.title: Sleep In! + Breakfast (Hotel Included)
activities.notes: Sleep in! Breakfast included. Eat well — lunch at 12:30 PM.

activities.title: Pack + Checkout + Depart
activities.notes: Pack warm clothes ACCESSIBLE in car for Bryce. Not in trunk!

activities.title: Drive Page → Kanab
activities.notes: Beautiful drive! Red rock country, Vermillion Cliffs, Colorado River area. Crossing into Utah!

activities.title: Gas + Bathroom Stop — Kanab, UT
activities.notes: Quick gas/bathroom stop. Cute small town.

activities.title: Drive Kanab → Bryce Canyon Area
activities.notes: Landscape changes dramatically — gaining elevation, pine forests appear.

activities.title: Lunch at Ruby's Inn
activities.notes: Restaurant right at park entrance. Good food, reasonable prices.

activities.title: ⭐ Sunset Point (Most Iconic Viewpoint!)
activities.notes: Enter Bryce Canyon, drive to Sunset Point. Most photographed viewpoint in the park!
whatToDo: Walk to viewpoint overlook (2 min from parking)
See thousands of orange/red hoodoo rock spires
Thor's Hammer — the iconic single standing hoodoo
Wall Street section visible below
Panoramic photos
tips: IT'S COLD! Wear all your warm layers
Stroller works on paved path to viewpoint
Best photos in afternoon light

activities.title: Rim Trail Walk (Sunset → Sunrise Point)
activities.notes: Paved, relatively flat trail between viewpoints. Stroller-friendly! Amazing views the whole way.
whatToDo: Walk the paved Rim Trail (0.5 miles)
Continuous views of hoodoos the entire walk
Multiple photo stops along the way
Easy enough for toddler to walk parts

activities.title: ⭐ Sunrise Point
activities.notes: Different angle on the hoodoos. Can see Boat Mesa and the Sinking Ship formation.
whatToDo: Walk to viewpoint
Different hoodoo formations than Sunset Point
See Boat Mesa (flat-topped mesa)
More family photos!

activities.title: ⭐ Inspiration Point (Best Panoramic!)
activities.notes: Highest concentration of hoodoos visible. Three viewing levels — Upper is best!
whatToDo: Upper Inspiration Point — best panoramic view in the park
See the Silent City (massive hoodoo field)
Three levels of viewpoints to explore
Best overall 'wow' factor

activities.title: Check into Ruby's Inn

location.name: Best Western Plus Ruby's Inn
location.address: 26 S Main St, Bryce Canyon City, UT 84764

activities.notes: Quick check-in. Rest time!

activities.title: Rest at Hotel
activities.notes: Warm up, rest, recharge.

activities.title: Optional: Bryce Point
activities.notes: Optional extra viewpoint if energy permits. Great views of the entire amphitheater.

activities.title: Dinner at Ruby's Inn Restaurant
activities.notes: Convenient dinner right at the hotel. Good western food.

days.timezoneNote: Starts in UT(MDT/UTC-6), crosses to NV(PDT/UTC-7). Phone clock jumps BACK 1hr. All times listed in PDT.
days.title: Zion National Park → Vegas Strip Finale
days.subtitle: Bryce → Zion → Las Vegas Strip Evening

weather.tips: Dress in layers — cold morning, warm by afternoon. Vegas evening is perfect.

hotel.name: Luxor Hotel & Casino
hotel.address: 3900 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89119

dailyTips: Zion entry: $35 OR America the Beautiful pass
Optional quick Bryce morning view (20 min) — worth it!
Vegas Strip evening is family-friendly
Late bedtime okay — vacation finale!

activities.title: Wake Up + Breakfast at Ruby's Inn
activities.notes: Breakfast included. Eat well — lunch not until 12:30 PM.

activities.title: Optional: Quick Bryce Morning View
activities.notes: Morning light = completely different than yesterday! Soft, cool tones. Worth 20 minutes if everyone is rested.
tips: Skip if running late or toddler is fussy
You saw it well yesterday — this is bonus

activities.title: Drive Bryce → Zion

distance.route: UT-12 West → US-89 South → UT-9 West

activities.notes: UT-12 = One of America's most scenic roads! Red Canyon, pine forests, mountain views. Temperature rises as you descend toward Zion.
tips: Enjoy the scenery — this drive is gorgeous!
Temperature warming: 45°F → 65°F

activities.title: Zion Visitor Center + Parking
activities.notes: Show America the Beautiful pass. Get shuttle info, park map, and ranger tips.
tips: Parking fills by 10 AM — you're arriving at good time
Free shuttle is only way into canyon

activities.title: ⭐ Zion Canyon Shuttle Experience
activities.notes: Free shuttle system takes you through the canyon. Get on/off at various stops. 2 hours to see highlights.
whatToDo: Board shuttle at Visitor Center
Big Bend stop — best views of the Great White Throne
Temple of Sinawava (end of road) — short Riverside Walk (1 mi paved, stroller-friendly)
See Angels Landing from below (no hiking it with toddler!)
Court of the Patriarchs — three massive sandstone peaks
Emerald Pools trail (if time — Lower Pool is easy, 1.2 mi round trip)
tips: Shuttles run every 7-10 minutes
Get off at Big Bend for best photos
Riverside Walk at end is flat and easy
Bring snacks and water

activities.title: Lunch in Springdale, UT
activities.notes: Cute tourist town right at Zion entrance. Multiple restaurant options. Budget ~$35-45.

activities.title: Drive Zion → Las Vegas
activities.notes: Straightforward freeway drive. Landscape changes from red rock to desert. Entering Nevada!

activities.title: Check into Luxor Hotel & Casino

location.name: Luxor Hotel & Casino
location.address: 3900 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89119

activities.notes: The pyramid hotel! Check in, rest, prepare for Vegas Strip evening.
tips: Valet parking or self-park
Rest is important — Vegas evening will be exciting
Change into fresh clothes for Strip walk

activities.title: REST at Luxor
activities.notes: Everyone rest/nap. Big evening ahead! Freshen up, change clothes.

activities.title: ⭐ LAS VEGAS STRIP Evening!

location.name: Las Vegas Strip
location.address: Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV

activities.notes: Trip finale! Walk the Strip, see the lights, enjoy the atmosphere. Family-friendly before 10 PM.
whatToDo: Bellagio Fountains — free water show every 15-30 min (mesmerizing!)
Walk through hotel lobbies — Bellagio, Caesars Palace, Venetian
See the volcano at The Mirage (if running)
M&M's World — 4 floors of candy (toddler heaven!)
Coca-Cola Store — fun photo ops
Street performers and lights — toddler will be amazed
Quick dinner on the Strip
tips: Bellagio Fountains are FREE and magical at night
Toddler in stroller — lots of walking
Vegas is safe and family-friendly in early evening
Budget $50-80 for dinner on Strip

days.title: Final Day — Vegas → Fly Home
days.subtitle: Relax, Pool, Return Car, Fly Home

weather.tips: Perfect pool weather. Sunscreen if swimming! Last day — enjoy it.

hotel.name: Luxor Hotel & Casino (checkout today)
hotel.address: 3900 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89119

dailyTips: SLEEP IN! No early alarm needed!
Late flight (10:40 PM) = full relaxation day!
Return Avis car by 7-8 PM
Ask for late checkout at Luxor
No rushing today — ENJOY IT!

activities.title: Sleep In! + Breakfast
activities.notes: No early alarm! Wake naturally. Starbucks in lobby or room service. Keep it simple.

activities.title: Pool Time or Relaxation
activities.notes: 75°F = perfect pool weather! Check with front desk if pool is open and heated. Bring swimsuits, sunscreen, towels.
whatToDo: Splash in pool with toddler
Relax in lounge chairs
Soak up the Vegas sun
Or just chill in room — zero pressure today!
tips: Supervise toddler constantly at pool!
Reapply sunscreen every hour
Towels available at pool station

activities.title: Lunch
activities.notes: Hotel restaurant, food court, or walk to nearby options. Keep it easy.

activities.title: More Pool or Rest in Room
activities.notes: Enjoy last vacation hours however you want!

activities.title: Late Checkout + Final Relax
activities.notes: Ask about late checkout. If not possible, store bags with bell desk.

activities.title: Final Pack + Quick Dinner
activities.notes: Pack everything completely. Quick dinner at hotel or grab food for airport. Load car.

activities.title: ⚠️ Return Avis Rental Car
activities.notes: Return Avis car. Remove car seat and ALL items from car. Take shuttle to airport terminal.
tips: Remove car seat FIRST
Check trunk, under seats, door pockets for forgotten items
Fill gas before returning (or pay their inflated price)
Keep Avis receipt

activities.title: Shuttle to LAS Terminal
activities.notes: Free shuttle from Rent-A-Car Center to terminal. 5-10 minute ride.

activities.title: Check-In + TSA Security + Gate
activities.notes: United Airlines check-in. TSA security. Find gate. 2+ hours of buffer time.
tips: Toddler keeps shoes on through TSA
Buy water/snacks after security
Charge devices at gate
Let toddler burn energy before boarding

activities.title: ✈️ DEPART LAS VEGAS — Fly Home!
activities.notes: Red-eye flight. Toddler should sleep most of it. Arrive Newark 6:35 AM. TRIP COMPLETE! 🎉
tips: Ear pressure for toddler: sippy cup during takeoff/landing
Everyone try to sleep
Set clocks ahead 3 hours (PST → EST)
Welcome home!
